name: Startop
overview: Startop is an Albanian reality TV show featuring aspiring entrepreneurs pitching innovative ideas to seasoned investors .Contestants seek funding and mentorship, showcasing creativity, resilience, and the challenges of entrepreneurship.

trailers.title: Promo | StarTop, projekti më i ri i sipërmarrjes me Eno Popin nis të këtë të shtunë në Top Channel!
